comment_text: IDK. I liked the trilogy. It has a lot going for it. However, I felt like the story was told. we do not need another chapter nor we need an off-shoot of one either. You wanna make a slasher in 1988, cool. Just call it something else instead of trying to continue a story that has already been told and trying to leech off the lore. I just don't think it works under that premise. Canon or not. I am not feeling it.
